title: Zerbie's Mining Master Tweaks
description: A Datapack for Mining Master that alters ore generation, enchantments, and adds compatability for a few other mods
body:
# Zerbie's Mining Master Tweaks
## Note: requires you have [Mining Master](https://modrinth.com/mod/mining-master) installed AND be running forge to make use of the compatabilities
## Note 2 (1-23-2026): Not to be mistaken as the "[Mining Master Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mining-master-tweaks)" resource pack. I've decided to change up the name upon realizing its existence.

This datapack changes how the ores from "Mining Master" generate, as well as making this mod compatible with a few other mods.
Do note that this datapack was made to suit my personal preferences, and is made for very specific mods in mind. Unless you only play with the mods that this datapack is built for, this datapack may not be for you.


## Tweaks
- Mining Master's Ores should generally generate 5x-10x more often
- Unbreaking Iolite and Divine Beryl at the moment generate at around 20x due to being found in fairly rare biomes
- Fire Ruby, Haste Peridot and Lucky Citrine should now be found in any "hot" biomes
- Removed and relocated some of Air Malachite's enchants to other gems
- Adds compatability for Farmers Delight, Alex's Caves, Alex's Mobs, and *Domestication Innovation
  - I've decided that the gems you use to enchant your pet's collar will be for "basic" enchants that simply enhance your pets, no shadow hands here!

## Enchant List
When enchanting items from Farmers Delight, Alex's Caves, Alex's Mobs, or Domestication Innovation, here's what enchantments you'll expect to get from some gems:
(Note: I'm only showing the enchants for MODDED items, these lists do not represent the total amount of enchants each gem has!)

Key: AC = Alex's Caves | AM = Alex's Mobs | DI = Domestication Innovation | FD = Farmers Delight

<details>
  
<summary>Fire Ruby</summary>

- Field Extension (Resistor Shield, AC)
- Solar (Ray Gun, AC)
- Precise Volley (Dreadbow, AC)
- Lavawax (Straddleboard, AM)
- Fireproof (DI)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Haste Peridot</summary>

- Ferrous Haste (Galena Gauntlet, AC)
- Swiftwood (Primitive Club, AC)
- Rapid Possession (Totem of Possession, AC)
- Dark Nock (Dreadbow, AC)
- Speedster (DI)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Dive Aquamarine</summary>

- Knight Jump
- Flinging (Ortholance, AC)
- Soak Seeking (Sea Staff, AC)
- Charting Call (Magic Conch, AC)
- Amphibious (DI)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Divine Beryl</summary>

- Shaded Respite (Dreadbow, AC)
- Second Wave (Ortholance, AC)
- Immunity Frame (DI)
- Backstabbing (Knives, FD)
- Straight Hook (Candy Cane Hook, AC)
- Targeted Ricochet (Shotgum, AC)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Heart Rhodonite</summary>

- Herd Phalanx (Extinction Spear, AC)
- X-ray (Ray Gun, AC)
- Astral Transferring (Totem of Possession, AC)
- Sated Blade (Dark Dagger, AC)
- Seapairing (Sea Staff, AC)
- Return Board (Straddleboard, AM)
- Health Boost (DI)
- Seekcandy (Sugar Staff, AC)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Ice Sapphire</summary>

- Respiration
- crystallize (Galena Gauntlet, AC)
- Impending Stab (Dark Dagger, AC)
- Enveloping Bubble (Sea Staff, AC)
- Frost Fang (DI)
- Peppermint Punting (Sugar Staff, AC)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Kinetic Opal</summary>

- Plummeting Flight (Extinction Spear, AC)
- Relentless Darkness (Dreadbow, AC)
- Bouncing Bolt (Sea Staff, AC)
- Straddle Jump (Straddleboard, AM)
- Tethered Teleport (DI)
- Far Flung (Candy Cane Hook, AC)
- Explosive Flavor (Shotgum, AC)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Lucky Citrine</summary>

- Arrow Inducting (Resistor Shield, AC)
- Twilight perfection (Dreadbow, AC)
- Deflection (DI)
- Multiple Mint (Sugar Staff, AC)
- Triple Split (Shotgum, AC)

</details>
<details>
  
<summary>Power Pyrite</summary>

- heavy slam (Resistor Shield, AC)
- dazing sweep (Primitive Club, AC)
- chomping spirit (Extinction Spear, AC)
- gamma ray (Ray Gun, AC)
- detonating death (Totem of Possession, AC)
- tsunami (Ortholance, AC)
- taxing_bellow (Magic Conch, AC)
- Serpent Charmer (Straddleboard, AM)
- herding (DI)
- Humungus Hex (Sugar Staff, AC)
- Sharp Cane (Candy Cane Hook, AC)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Spider Kunzite</summary>

- Feather Falling
- Bonking (primitive club, AC)
- Sightless (totem of possession, AC)
- Triple Splash (Sea Staff, AC)
- Poison Resistance (DI)
- Spell Lasting (Sugar Staff, AC)
- Bouncy Ball (Shotgum, AC)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Spirit Garnet</summary>

- Double Stab (Dark Dagger, AC)
- Sea Swing (Ortholance, AC)
- Lasting Morale (Magic Conch, AC....wolololo)
- Gluttonous (DI)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Unbreaking Iolite</summary>

- Energy Efficiency (Ray Gun, AC)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Air Malachite</summary>

- Void Cloud (DI)
- Removed Knight Jump, Respiration, and Feather Falling

</details>
